commands.cmd:
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  raw=$(apt-get -s upgrade 2>/dev/null) \
    || { echo "apt-get -s upgrade failed" >&2; exit 1; }
  count=$(printf '%s\n' "$raw" | grep '^Inst' | grep -c -- '-security' || true)
elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  raw=$(dnf updateinfo -q list security 2>/dev/null) \
    || { echo "dnf updateinfo failed" >&2; exit 1; }
  count=$(printf '%s\n' "$raw" | grep -c '^[A-Za-z]' || true)
else
  echo "no package manager (apt-get/dnf) found" >&2
  exit 1
fi
printf '{"patches":%d}' "$count"
